SummaryOfDirectChrtblActyGrp.Description3Txt: PROVIDED FUNDING TO ADDRESS VARIOUS COMMUNITY ISSUES
SummaryOfDirectChrtblActyGrp.Description4Txt: FUNDING TO ADDRESS VARIOUS HUMAN SERVICES ISSUES

ApplicationSubmissionInfoGrp.FormAndInfoAndMaterialsTxt: FOUNDED IN 1982 BY EDITH KINNEY GAYLORD, INASMUCH FOUNDATION IMPROVES THE QUALITY OF LIFE IN OKLAHOMA CITY THROUGH GRANTMAKING IN THE AREAS OF COMMUNITY ENHANCEMENT, EDUCATION, HEALTH AND HUMAN SERVICES, AND JOURNALISM.
ApplicationSubmissionInfoGrp.RestrictionsOnAwardsTxt: ALL INCOME FROM INASMUCH FOUNDATION, EXCEPT COSTS OF ADMINISTRATION AND POSSIBLE TAXES, HAS BEEN DESIGNATED BY THE FOUNDER FOR CHARITABLE AND EDUCATIONAL PURPOSES. ALL DISTRIBUTIONS MUST MEET THE DEFINITION OF A "QUALIFYING DISTRIBUTION" AS SET FORTH IN SECTION 4942(G) OF THE INTERNAL REVENUE CODE OF 1986, AS AMENDED, OR APPLICABLE PROVISIONS OF OTHER FEDERAL TAX LAWS.
